titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Yale Egyptological Institute in Egypt, Yale University, Records
Yale Egyptological Institute in Egypt, Yale University, Records
titlestmt.author: compiled by Michael Lotstein

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Tuesday September 24, 2019 at 09:52

did.unittitle: Yale Egyptological Institute in Egypt, Yale University, records

odd.head: General
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 14B (YRG 14B), Records of academic departments and programs of the Yale Faculty of Arts and Sciences.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Yale Egyptological Institute in Egypt, Yale University, records (RU 1158). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

did.unittitle: Church of Saint Shenoute (White Monastery) photographs

relatedmaterial.head: Related Materials
relatedmaterial.p: Digital copies of the photographs in this accession are accessible only to members of the Yale community: http://search.library.yale.edu/academic_commons?q=church+of+saint+shenoute.

did.unittitle: West exterior wall. Church of Saint Shenoute (White Monastery), Sohag, Egypt, ca. 448 CE. Expedition of the Yale Egyptological Institue in Egypt

Southwest stair and adjoining passage- stair, looking north down to first landing. Church of Saint Shenoute (White Monastery), Sohag, Egypt, ca. 448 CE. Expedition of the Yale Egyptological Institute in Egypt.

Southwest stair and adjoining passage- stair, looking south up to second landing, with southwest dome in background. Church of Saint Shenoute (White Monastery), Sohag, Egypt, ca. 448 CE. Expedition of the Yale Egyptological Institute in Egypt.
